sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n1167" key="a)deh/s2" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀδε-ής</orth> (B), <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ές</itype>, (<etym lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="etym">δέομαι</etym>) <sense id="n1167.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">not in want</tr_>, <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">τινός</foreign> Max Tyr.<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0003.tlg001.perseus-grc1:5:1" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">5.1</biblScope></bibl>, al.</sense> </entryFree>
